company.what_they_do: Block Sherpa is a UK-headquartered (London), crypto-native consulting and development firm. They specialize in blockchain strategy, smart contract engineering, and decentralized application (dApp) development for enterprises, startups, and Web3-native clients across Europe, Asia-Pacific, and the Americas. They are technology-agnostic, selecting the optimal stack per project (Solidity, Rust, or Vyper; EVM or non-EVM chains including Solana, Sui, Aptos; Layer-1 or Layer-2). Their full-lifecycle capabilities include tokenomics, DeFi protocol development, NFT passports, on-chain insurance, dApp frontends, multi-chain integration, enterprise security auditing/pen testing, and ongoing product evolution. Clients retain full IP ownership with no licensing fees or royalties. They claim 50+ delivered Web3 solutions across DeFi, NFT marketplaces, supply chain traceability, healthcare records, gaming, and real-world asset tokenization.
raw_notes: Founded by seasoned crypto investors and blockchain engineers who understand both technical and economic layers of decentralized systems.
Backed by crypto-native investors with capital markets expertise and ecosystem connections.
Technology-agnostic: no vendor lock-in, no prescribed frameworks.
Engineering stack spans Solidity, Rust, Vyper; EVM-compatible and non-EVM chains (Solana, Sui, Aptos); L1/L2; on-prem or cloud-native.
50+ Web3 solutions delivered: DeFi, NFT marketplaces, supply chain, healthcare records, gaming, real-world asset tokenization.
Full IP ownership for clients. No licensing fees, no ongoing royalties.
Serves regulated enterprises, funded startups, and blockchain-native scale-ups.
GitHub presence: two orgs found — github.com/Block-Sherpa and github.com/Block-Sherpa-WorkPlace — both listing blockcsherpa.dev and hello@blockcsherpa.dev as contacts.

Repos of interest include forks of wagmi, EIPs, Superfluid Protocol Monorepo, prysm, protocol-studies, and a SaaS Boilerplate (Next.js + Tailwind CSS + Shadcn UI + TypeScript) — indicating active full-stack and protocol-level engineering work.
Website (blockcsherpa.dev) is very new / still loading ('Loading BlockSherpa...' only — JavaScript app not yet rendered or still in development).
Note: blocksherpa.dev (without the 'c') is an unrelated expired domain. blocksherpa.ai is a separate, unrelated older project.

individual.name: Jose
individual.notes: Only first name 'Jose' is known. The contact email is hello@blockcsherpa.dev (a general/team inbox, not a personal address), which limits individual attribution. No public profiles (LinkedIn, GitHub, Twitter/X, press mentions) were found that link a person named Jose specifically to Block Sherpa. Both GitHub orgs list no public members. Jose may be a founder, given the company appears early-stage and the email is the same one listed publicly on GitHub for the entire org, but this cannot be confirmed from available sources.
